# NOME: Direttrice 7 (Tirano - Sondrio - Lecco - Milano)
# CAPOLINEA: TIRANO, CENTRALE, ROGOREDO, LECCO, SONDRIO, COLICO, GARIBALDI

# SERVIZIO: RE8
2812, 2814, 2816, 2818, 2820, 2822, 2824, 2826, 2828, 2830, 2832, 2834, 2836, 2838, 2840, 2842

2811, 2813, 2815, 2817, 2819, 2821, 2823, 2825, 2827, 2829, 2831, 2833, 2835, 2837, 2839, 2841, 2843

# SERVIZIO: S8
24814, 24816, 24818, 24820, 24822, 24824, 24826, 24828, 24830, 24832, 24834, 24836, 24838, 24840, 24842, 24844, 24846, 24848, 24850, 24852, 24854, 24856, 24858, 24860, 24862, 24864, 24866, 24868, 24870, 24872, 24874, 24876, 24878, 24880, 24882, 24884, 24886

24817, 24819, 24821, 24823, 24825, 24827, 24829, 24831, 24833, 24835, 24837, 24839, 24841, 24843, 24845, 24847, 24849, 24851, 24853, 24855, 24857, 24859, 24861, 24863, 24865, 24867, 24869, 24871, 24873, 24875, 24877, 24879, 24881, 24883, 24885, 24887, 24889
